summary: Walkthrough mode emits a DecisionResult event for every committed decision; the stats subsystem consumes it to update walkthrough-scope counters and the GTO-deviation score.

decision_result_event.name: stats.recordDecisionResult
decision_result_event.DecisionResult_shape: { hand_id: string, mode: 'walkthrough', user_action: string, user_sizing: number | null, gto_mix: { [action: string]: { frequency: number, sizing?: number } }, score_label: 'matches GTO mix' | 'partial' | 'off-tree', deviation_score: number, timestamp: number }
decision_result_event.purpose: Walkthrough calls this in its commit handler. Stats updates running counters (walkthrough hands answered, deviation score aggregate) and persists via storage.

data_passed_not_logic: Walkthrough passes a structured event payload; stats does not call back into walkthrough.
test_seam: Unit test: emit a synthetic DecisionResult; read the stats counters via the dashboard read API; assert that walkthrough_decisions counter incremented and deviation_score aggregate updated.
